summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the new Forgot Password feature. All backend API endpoints and frontend UI components are working correctly. The complete password reset flow (forgot → email sent → reset with token → login with new password) is fully functional.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/auth/forgot-password - creates reset token in database
Backend: /api/auth/forgot-password - returns success for non-existent email (prevents enumeration)
Backend: /api/auth/forgot-password - validates email format (422 for invalid)
Backend: /api/auth/reset-password - validates and updates password with valid token
Backend: /api/auth/reset-password - returns 400 for invalid/expired token
Backend: /api/auth/reset-password - returns 400 for empty token
Backend: Token consumed after use (cannot reuse)
Backend: Multiple reset requests only keep latest token
Backend: User can login with new password after reset
Backend: Old password rejected after reset
Frontend: Forgot Password page loads correctly
Frontend: All data-testid attributes present on Forgot Password page
Frontend: Email input accepts valid email and shows success state
Frontend: 'Back to Sign In' link navigates to /login
Frontend: Reset Password page loads with valid token
Frontend: Reset Password page shows 'Invalid or Expired Link' when no token provided
Frontend: Reset Password form validates and submits successfully
Frontend: Success state shown after password reset with 'Sign In Now' button
Frontend: Error state with 'Request New Link' shown for invalid token
Frontend: 'Request New Link' navigates to /forgot-password
Frontend: Login page 'Forgot password?' link navigates to /forgot-password
Frontend: 'try again' link resets form after success state
critical_code_review_comments: Token expiration (1 hour) correctly implemented in backend
Email sending via RESEND_API_KEY is optional - if not configured, reset link is logged (acceptable for dev)
Frontend has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Security: Non-existent email returns same success message to prevent enumeration
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users for password reset testing (e2e_flow_*, ui_test_*, forgottest_* prefixes)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Forgot Password feature is fully implemented and working. Test users created: e2e_flow_*, ui_test_*, forgottest_* prefixes. Password reset tokens stored in 'password_reset_tokens' collection with 1-hour expiration. Email sending requires RESEND_API_KEY to be configured.

test_credentials.note: Test users created during testing with various email prefixes

forgot_password_page.functionality: Email input, form submission, success state with 'Check Your Email' message

reset_password_page.functionality: Password input, confirm password, form submission, success/error states

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email sending via Resend is conditional on RESEND_API_KEY being set. Token creation works regardless.
